# Retail fuel prices: # Delhi is the directly-compiled bellwether series (state_code ALL mirrors DL). Other states
# 2017-2026: Delhi annual average + capital-city differential from era-anchored RSP snapshots
# scripts/compile_state_fuel_prices.py and data/raw/ppac/ for anchors. Valid because
# post-deregulation price *movements* are near-identical across states; *levels* differ by
# state VAT (which the differentials capture per era). Caveats: HR/PB use shared capital
# Chandigarh (UT VAT — Punjab in-state pumps run ~Rs 3/l higher); GJ=Ahmedabad
# JK=Srinagar; GA/NE states/AN/DN have 2022-26 only; LA/LD absent; CNG only where city gas

representative city-gas city where the capital

# Retail fuel prices: # lacks CNG. Pre-2017 non-DL years intentionally absent -> panel falls back to ALL proxy.
